channel.title: foreign keys on Grapefruitmoon.net
channel.description: Recent content in foreign keys on Grapefruitmoon.net

item.title: T-SQL to drop all Foreign Keys that reference a table
item.description: In a recent data migration project, I had a task to re-number some primary key columns for certain tables, so that there was no key overlap when a number of systems were combined. Part of this process involved identifying and dropping all the foreign keys that referenced the primary key on the tables that were being changed, then adding them again after the updates were completed. To save a bit of time, I knocked up this little script to generate the DROP and ALTER statements for the referencing foreign keys for a given table.
